abstract_en: A platform direction for physical-AI world models spanning robotics and driving.
abstract_zh: 面向机器人与自动驾驶的 Physical AI 世界模型平台方向。
editorial_summary_zh: 把世界模型正式推向 Physical AI 的基础设施层。
editorial_summary_en: Turns world models into infrastructure for physical AI.
why_it_matters: Signals that world models are becoming platform primitives for robotics and autonomy.
